name: Nam Prik Kaeng Matsaman (Massaman Curry Paste)
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the dried chilies in hot water for 15 minutes and remove the seeds.
2. In a wok over low heat, dry fry the shallots, garlic, galangal, lemon grass, cloves, coriander seeds, and cumin seeds together for about 5 minutes.
3. Grind the mixture into a powder using a mortar and pestle.
4. Blend all remaining ingredients (except shrimp paste) in a blender until well combined.
5. Add the ground shallot-garlic-galangal-lemon grass-clove-coriander seed-cumin seed mixture to the blender, then add the shrimp paste and blend again to achieve a fine-textured paste.
6. Store the paste in a glass jar in the refrigerator for up to 3-4 months.
This recipe is from The Elegant Taste of Thailand by Sisamon Kongpan & Pinyo Srisawat.
